title.purpose: Section headers, dialog titles, card headers.

body.purpose: Running text, table cells, form values. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Section labels, column headers, metadata. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Resting card elevation. Edge definition, not drama.

shadows.name: dropdown
shadows.purpose: Floating menus, popovers. Lifts above page content.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Dialogs. Heaviest layer; signals highest elevation.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Entrance animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Active Signal Green — used for create, save, confirm actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #33CC85; color: #09090B; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2DB873; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #33CC85; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent bg, border. For cancel, back, secondary options.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: transparent; color: #F4F4F5; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #25252C; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #202027; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #33CC85; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Delete and irreversible actions only. Cut Red. Never for warnings.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #D43A3A; color: #F4F4F5; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #B83030; } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D43A3A; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-destructive:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard container. Bench Surface background, Seam border. 8px radius.
components.html:
Provider Status

OpenRouter · 3 models active
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111113; border: 1px solid rgba(37,37,44,0.6); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.45), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #F4F4F5; letter-spacing: -0.015em; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: #818189; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field. Void background, Seam border, 6px radius. Focus ring in Active Signal.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #818189; } .ds-input { background: #09090B; color: #F4F4F5; border: 1px solid #25252C; border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #818189; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #33CC85; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #202027; opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Default muted, hover raised, active green icon.
components.html: Models
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; color: #818189; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1), color 120ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #202027; color: #F4F4F5; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #202027; color: #F4F4F5; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-icon { color: #33CC85; } .ds-nav-icon { flex-shrink: 0; transition: color 120ms; } .ds-nav-label { white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline status tag. Three variants: default, active (green), error (red).
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Outfit, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-badge { background: #202027; color: #818189; } .ds-badge--active { background: rgba(51,204,133,0.15); color: #33CC85; } .ds-badge--error { background: rgba(212,58,58,0.15); color: #D43A3A; }

components.name: Live Pulse Dot
components.description: Animated status indicator. Green = live/routing. Red = offline/error.
components.css: .ds-pulse-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-pulse-dot--live { background: #33CC85; animation: ds-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-pulse-dot--error { background: #D43A3A; animation: ds-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-pulse-dot--live, .ds-pulse-dot--error { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
This is a tool, not a product. Tools do not perform. They sit ready, legible under any light, each element placed where it belongs — not where it looks impressive. LLM Switch's visual language follows that discipline: dark by default, density earned through real hierarchy, zero surfaces that exist only to fill space.

The emerald primary is not an accent for decoration. It is a signal: active, routing, alive. When it appears, something is running. When it doesn't, nothing is asking for attention.

This system explicitly rejects the vocabulary of SaaS dashboards: gradient hero cards, metric tiles with colored backdrops, glassmorphism panels, illustration-heavy empty states.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-mode default; light mode fully supported but secondary
Single emerald accent used exclusively for active/live/interactive states
Tinted near-black neutrals (blue-cast zinc, never pure gray)
Density through deliberate hierarchy, not by cramming elements
Shadows as structural layer, never decorative

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Active Signal Green appears on ≤15% of any given screen surface. Its rarity is the information.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: #000000 and #FFFFFF are prohibited. Every neutral is tinted toward HSL 240°.

rules.name: The Gray-On-Color Prohibition
rules.body: Never place muted-foreground text on a colored background. Muted text is calibrated against dark neutrals only.

rules.name: The Weight-Then-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy through weight contrast first, size second. Add weight before adding a new size step.

rules.name: The No Decorative Type Rule
rules.body: No gradient text, no outlined text, no text shadows. Weight and size are the only tools.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Hover feedback = background tint shift, not shadow escalation. Shadows are for floating elements only.

dos: Do use Active Signal Green exclusively for interactive and live-state affordances
Do tint all neutrals toward HSL 240° (blue-zinc) — never pure gray
Do use .shadow-card on panels, .shadow-dropdown on menus, .shadow-modal on dialogs
Do keep body text at 14px minimum, max 65ch line length
Do use weight contrast (400 vs 600) as the first hierarchy tool
Do use .animate-fade-in-up (280ms ease-out-quart) for content arrival
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for all non-essential animations
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast on all text
donts: Don't build SaaS dashboard layouts with gradient hero cards or colored metric tiles
Don't produce a generic shadcn/ui defaults clone — every choice must be deliberate
Don't use illustrations, large decorative icons, or motivational copy in empty states
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — use solid color
Don't place muted-foreground text on any colored background
Don't animate layout properties — animate transform and opacity only
Don't use bounce or elastic easing
Don't add more accent colors beyond emerald and Cut Red
